text_block_list.text:
I go up to the roof during lunch, where I find
Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Guh... Th-this drink should help get rid of my
fatigue...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes! T-Trainer?! I'm just drinking a wellness shot.
choice_data_list: That's a sports drink you're holding.
That's a sports drink you're holding.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... R-reeeaaally?! I couldn't tell at all, and I've
already had so much of it!

The fatigue must have dulled her senses. The
rooftop is littered with her empty plastic bottles. I
probably should rework our future race schedule.
